originalTitle: Pro stock pickers cannot beat simple math — war in the Middle East is proving it
summary: Active stock pickers almost always lose against the broad market. They can’t beat simple math.
content: Active stock pickers almost always lose against the broad market. They can’t beat simple math.
chineseTitle: 专业选股者无法战胜简单的数学——中东战争证明了这一点
chineseSummary: 积极的选股者几乎总是会输给大盘。他们无法击败简单的数学。
chineseContent: 积极的选股者几乎总是会输给大盘。他们无法击败简单的数学。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
